description: HTTP fetch and binary download. fetch returns page text; download saves bytes to workspace/.

capabilities.name: tool.browser.fetch
capabilities.description: HTTP retrieval tool. op:read — fetches URL via Jina AI (renders JavaScript, returns clean Markdown — use for modern sites and image galleries). op:fetch — raw HTTP GET, returns HTML/JSON (fast, no JS). op:download — saves binary file to workspace/ (use for direct image/PDF/ZIP URLs).

op.description: read=JS-rendered Markdown via Jina; fetch=raw HTML; download=save binary to workspace/

dest.description: Filename in workspace/ for download op (optional — inferred from URL if omitted)

maxChars.description: Max chars to return for read/fetch op (default 8000)
